quoteFirst: “Rode to-day, altogether, thirteen hours, through deserts, partly,      and partly over barren, unsightly hills, and latterly through wild,      rocky scenery, and camped at
quoteLast: on the      banks of a limpid stream, near a Syrian village.  Do not know its      name--do not wish to know it--want to go to bed.
